chapter_title.ar: باب آخَرُ مِنْهُ فِي حَالِ الِاضْطِرَارِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 2 – Another Chapter from it regarding the state of desperation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/6)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/6)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الذَّبِيحَةِ بِغَيْرِ حَدِيدَةٍ قَالَ إِذَا اضْطُرِرْتَ إِلَيْهَا فَإِنْ لَمْ تَجِدْ حَدِيدَةً فَاذْبَحْهَا بِحَجَرٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said regarding the (animal) slaughtered without iron. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When you are desperate towards it, and you do not find an iron, so slaughter it by a stone’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “About the case of slaughtering without iron, abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘In an emergency when you cannot find iron you can slaughter with stone.”’
